title: identity.subject Facet
description: Demanded by the SCIM identity projector's Normalizer output Contract (ADR-0079 slice 3): the canonical coordinates any identity SUBJECT carries — a user, group, service, or machine. The cross-form projection under which subjects are queryable regardless of source (the peer of identity.credential). A rebuildable projection of the IdP system of record (§1.2, INV-1: written only by this Normalizer + Run provenance); the graph is never the identity authority and never writable as a directory (INV-2). No secret material (§2.5). `scheme` is an OPEN string (§1.4). Single write-owner per §2.1; validated at the Projector write path.

scheme.description: Subject form — OPEN (not a closed core enum): well-known values include user, group, service, machine.

authority.description: The issuing IdP/directory this subject is projected from.

status.description: Lifecycle status projected from the SoR — active | disabled (never authored in the graph, INV-2).
